Description:
Mission:
- Stand up public deployment infrastructure for iGRAIL
- remove avoidable LAN dependencies
- prove the GitHub-gated production path with one small safe release

Definition of done:
- dedicated Vercel project exists
- dedicated Supabase production boundary exists
- GitHub gates production deployment
- required secrets and env vars are configured
- one small PR deploys successfully after merge to main

Summary: Create dedicated Vercel project for iGRAIL
Description:
Create a separate Vercel project for the iGRAIL application.

Acceptance notes:
- project is not shared with unrelated apps
- production domain strategy is confirmed
- VERCEL_PROJECT_ID and VERCEL_ORG_ID are captured

Summary: Configure Vercel production environment variables for iGRAIL
Description:
Populate the iGRAIL Vercel project with required app environment variables.

Required variables:
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
- SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
- QUICK_POST_SECRET

Optional:
- FRESHRSS_API_URL
- FRESHRSS_API_USERNAME
- FRESHRSS_API_PASSWORD
- FRESHRSS_RSS_URL

Summary: Configure GitHub secrets for Vercel deployment workflow
Description:
Add the GitHub repository secrets used by the production deployment workflow.

Required:
- VERCEL_TOKEN
- VERCEL_ORG_ID
- VERCEL_PROJECT_ID

Summary: Protect main and require GitHub checks before production release
Description:
Configure GitHub branch protection so production deployments remain GitHub-gated.

Acceptance notes:
- main is protected
- PRs are required before merge
- Tests workflow is required before merge
- optional review gate enabled if desired

Summary: Disable duplicate Vercel direct production deploy path
Description:
If Vercel direct Git production auto-deploy is enabled, disable it so GitHub Actions remains the single release gate.

Reason:
- avoids duplicate production deployments
- keeps release authority in GitHub history

Summary: Create dedicated Supabase production project for iGRAIL
Description:
Create a dedicated Supabase production project for iGRAIL.

Acceptance notes:
- not shared with unrelated apps
- production keys are captured and stored in the correct systems

Summary: Choose and create non-production Supabase environment for iGRAIL
Description:
Create or choose the non-production Supabase path for safe testing.

Acceptable options:
- separate staging project
- separate dev project
- managed branching strategy

Summary: Configure Supabase auth redirect URLs for local and production
Description:
Configure Supabase auth so OAuth callbacks work in both local development and production.

Acceptance notes:
- local redirect URL works
- production redirect URL works
- no stale production URL assumptions remain in auth flow

Summary: Run Supabase schema parity audit for public content fields
Description:
Verify that the live schema matches the app assumptions for public content rendering.

Known focus area:
- authors table fields
- especially any mismatch around title or profile metadata

Summary: Seed at least one published featured article for public QA
Description:
Seed one published and featured article so the homepage and Think Tank surfaces can be validated visually.

Acceptance notes:
- article appears on public surfaces
- no mock fallback is needed for basic public reading QA

Summary: Decide FreshRSS production strategy and move it off LAN if needed
Description:
Make an explicit production decision for FreshRSS.

Options:
- public endpoint
- tunnel or reverse proxy
- deliberate temporary mock fallback

Current issue:
- local testing showed LAN-only dependency behavior

Summary: Audit video feed configuration and validate YouTube source IDs
Description: Validate the current video ingest configuration and correct any broken YouTube source identifiers before relying on production video sync.

Summary: Run first GitHub-gated production deployment smoke test
Description:
Use a tiny documentation-only or copy-only PR to prove the deployment path.

Required sequence:
- branch
- tiny change
- validate and build locally
- PR
- GitHub tests
- merge to main
- automatic production deployment
- smoke check
Update the stale baseline-browser-mapping dependency and rerun validation so the remaining non-blocking warning is cleared.

Summary: Create stable demo dataset for local QA and student onboarding
Description: Create a reliable demo dataset for articles, feeds, and media so regression testing and student onboarding use the same known-good content set.
